name: criminal_justice_municipal_bond_covenant_harbor_rig_utl
premise: Restorative justice diversion is full; victims’ advocates demand conventional prosecution while caseload caps loom. In Criminal Justice, the situation tagged internally around criminal justice municipal bond covenant harbor rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. The trade is not abstract: it is rights versus utility under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Priya Alvarez
agents.identity: I am Priya Alvarez, the accountable executive on this bridge in Criminal Justice. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Mateo Mensah
agents.identity: I am Mateo Mensah, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Criminal Justice. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if rights advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for utility.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Priya Alvarez must choose under rights versus utility. What does Priya Alvarez do?
